name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State definitions *)
THINKING == 0
HUNGRY == 1
EATING == 2

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]  (* 0 indicates fork is free *)
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> THINKING]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ states[i] = THINKING
                     /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = HUNGRY]
  (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ states[i] = HUNGRY
                     /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
                     /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = 0
                     /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
                     /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = EATING]
  (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : /\ states[i] = EATING
                     /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
                     /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = THINKING]
  (* No state change *)
  \/ forks' = forks
      /\ states' = states

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {THINKING, HUNGRY, EATING}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max({num[j] : j \in 1..N})]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ size \in 0..K
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0
        /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]

Producer == /\ size < K
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ size' = size + 1
           /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Servers

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state


(* --state Follower
  state = Follower
  currentTerm = 0
  votedFor = None
*)
(* --state Candidate
  state = Candidate
  currentTerm = currentTerm + 1
  votedFor = self
*)
(* --state Leader
  state = Leader
*)

(* --type invariant
  TypeOK == /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}
          /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Servers
*)

(* --specification
  Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
*)

(* --init
  Init == /\ state = Follower
          /\ currentTerm = 0
          /\ votedFor = None
*)

(* --next
  Next == 
    \/ /\ state = Follower
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
       /\ votedFor' = votedFor
       /\ state' = Candidate
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
       /\ votedFor' = self
    \/ /\ state = Candidate
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
       /\ votedFor' = votedFor
       /\ state' = Leader
    \/ /\ state = Leader
       /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
       /\ votedFor' = votedFor
       /\ state' = Leader
*)

(* --invariant
  TypeOK
*)

(* --temporal property
  Spec
*)

(* --configuration
  SPECIFICATION Spec
  INVARIANT TypeOK
*)

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ offsets[i] = offsets[i] + (RandomOffset)
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + (AverageOffset)
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ offsets[i] = offsets[i] + (RandomOffset)

RandomOffset == CHOOSE delta \in -1..1 : delta
AverageOffset == CHOOSE avg \in 1..N : (Sum([j \in 1..N |-> clocks[j]]) \div N) - clocks[i]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = flag
          /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
        /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Pages, Client

VARIABLES free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Client |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
        \/ \E c \in Client:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
        /\ wants \in {0, 1}
        /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = 0

Next == 
    \/ /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = 0
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ wants' = 1
    \/ /\ turn = 1
        /\ wants = 0
        /\ turn' = 0
        /\ wants' = 1
    \/ /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = 1
        /\ turn' = 0
        /\ wants' = 1
    \/ /\ turn = 1
        /\ wants = 1
        /\ turn' = 1
        /\ wants' = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>
